name: FILL
description: Fill the path accumulated since the previous draw command. `paint_len` slots of tagged draw-paint fields (draw_paint_fields.json) follow inline; unspecified fields take their defaults.

name: QUADRATIC_TO
description: Append a quadratic Bézier from the current point through control (cx, cy) to (x, y) (#726).

name: CUBIC_TO
description: Append a cubic Bézier from the current point via controls (c1x, c1y) and (c2x, c2y) to (x, y) (#726).

name: ARC_TO
description: Append a circular arc of `radius` tangent to the line from the current point to (x1, y1) and the line from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2), like the HTML canvas `arcTo` (#726). A leading line segment connects the current point to the arc's first tangent point. `radius <= 0` or collinear points degenerate to a lineTo (x1, y1).

name: RECT
description: Append a closed rectangle subpath (convenience shape; #726).

name: RRECT
description: Append a closed rounded-rectangle subpath with corner radii (rx, ry) (convenience shape; #726). Radii clamp to half the corresponding side.

name: OVAL
description: Append a closed ellipse subpath inscribed in the (x, y, width, height) box (convenience shape; #726).

name: CIRCLE
description: Append a closed circle subpath centred at (cx, cy) (convenience shape; #726).

name: STROKE
description: Stroke the path accumulated since the previous draw command (#727). Shares the tagged draw-paint packet with FILL; the stroke fields (strokeWidth / cap / join / miterLimit / dash / dashOffset) drive the outline, `color` its ink. `paint_len` slots of tagged draw-paint fields follow inline; unspecified fields take their defaults.

name: SAVE
description: Push the canvas state (current transform + clip) onto the save stack (#728). The only mutable state a draw canvas has.

name: RESTORE
description: Pop the canvas state from the save stack, restoring the transform and clip (#728). A restore with an empty stack is a no-op.

name: TRANSLATE
description: Post-translate the current transform by (dx, dy) logical px (#728).

name: ROTATE
description: Post-rotate the current transform by `radians` about the current origin (#728).

name: SCALE
description: Post-scale the current transform by (sx, sy) (#728).

name: TRANSFORM
description: Post-concat an affine matrix onto the current transform (#728). Column convention matches CSS/canvas matrix(a,b,c,d,e,f): x' = a·x + c·y + e, y' = b·x + d·y + f.

name: CLIP_RECT
description: Intersect the clip with an axis-aligned rectangle in the current transform (#728). Cleared by the matching restore.

name: CLIP_PATH
description: Intersect the clip with the path accumulated since the previous draw command, under the current transform (#728). Consumes the path (like FILL). Cleared by the matching restore.
